intro: Gunshots and neon lights collide in a city that never sleeps, and the most dangerously adorable girls squad you've ever seen is about to pull the trigger!
description:
Meet the Liberty Line, an off-the-books all-female special ops crew that handles missions too dangerous for any government agency, all while flashing a flirty smile. RINA, the doe-eyed sharpshooter whose innocent grin hides pinpoint lethal accuracy. MOMO, the smoldering femme fatale whose very presence makes your heart stop. These two bishoujo agents are the ultimate ace of Kawaii Force, and they're diving headfirst into the shadowy conspiracy of Valesia, a ruthless all-female crime syndicate that has the city's underground weapons market locked down tight. Powered by cutting-edge cel-shading technology that looks better than any anime, Kawaii Force: Liberty Line pushes urban action immersion to an absolute new level!

・From the rooftop of a downtown skyscraper mall to rain-soaked back alleys, track Valesia's weapons smuggling routes and complete thrilling missions!
・Use gold earned from cleared stages to unlock RINA and MOMO's provocative and jaw-dropping costume collection!
・Every costume you unlock reveals an exclusive original wallpaper themed to that outfit. Your collector's instinct will go into overdrive!
・Dive into SHOW Mode with your collected costumes and unlock yet another hidden original wallpaper. The quality will leave you absolutely speechless!
・Touch RINA and MOMO directly to discover their hidden charms, from bubbly cute reactions to adorably flustered responses!
・Use Gallery Mode to collect stunning, glamorous bishoujo illustrations that light up the city night and build your own ultimate collection!
・View your collected costumes from every angle in 360-degree Character Viewer Mode and enjoy them exactly the way you want!
・Only those who clear the full story will unlock the long-awaited Ending Story. The shocking truth hidden deep within Liberty Line is finally revealed!

A neon-soaked city. Two dangerously kawaii agents. One explosive showdown. Thrilling story, provocative costume collection, hidden wallpaper unlocks, gallery collecting, and a jaw-dropping ending. Kawaii Force: Liberty Line packs in the cuteness, the firepower, and the deadly sexy all in one definitive visual TPS package! Download Kawaii Force: Liberty Line now and save the city alongside the most dangerous and irresistible bishoujo special ops team ever assembled!

Prologue
Gunshots echo through a city glowing with neon. Beneath the glamorous surface, the all-female crime syndicate Valesia has seized complete control of the underground weapons market, silently tightening its grip on every corner of the city. With official agencies gone quiet, only one crew remains. An unofficial all-female special ops team that handles the missions no government will touch, with nothing but a smile on their lips. That crew is Liberty Line. That force is Kawaii Force.

RINA hides pinpoint shooting talent behind the most disarming smile you've ever seen. MOMO conceals state-of-the-art comm gear beneath dazzling accessories and a battle outfit that turns heads mid-firefight. These two share exactly one thing in common: "Cute. But absolutely terrifying." What started as a routine mission to trace Valesia's weapons smuggling route slowly revealed something far more dangerous, a plan big enough to bring the entire city to its knees.

First mission: the rooftop of a high-rise shopping mall. Without warning, an explosion ripped through the night and the entire city went dark. Then a cold voice crackled through the comms: "Liberty Code 07. Internal breach detected. Mission changed." At the center of the conspiracy was a name, someone who once stood alongside Kawaii Force. When the city lights flickered back on, their shadows were already moving toward the next target.
